If you think Apple is the most desired brand in the world, you're completely wrong. This Forbes list I'm about to show you isn't a list of the world's richest brands by revenue, but rather the most coveted brands by the global public. These are the famous brands that people would sell their dinner to acquire. So, in 10th place we have Hitscom, a luxury hotel chain. In ninth place we have Buffer App, a social media management app. In eighth place we have Trader Joe's, a very famous supermarket chain in the United States. In seventh place we have Harley Davidson. Surely you already imagined it would be on this list, didn't you? In sixth place we have Amazon. Yes, you should already know this; the whole world wants Amazon's goodies. In fifth place we have Cusco (I think that's how it's pronounced), a retail brand. In fourth place we have Zapos, an online store similar to Amazon, but with different services. In third place we have Dollar Shave Club, a company...  First place goes to the brand of razor blades, and secondly we have that company that's the dream of anyone who wants to take an international trip—it's not my dream, but we're talking about Disney. Yes, Disney is the brand that's the biggest consumer dream for people all over the world, whether you like it or not, that's a fact we can't deny. And my friends, first place goes to the one you often use to steal money from your friends' and family's accounts—we're talking about Netflix. But tell me, did you already know the brands on this list? And if you want to make your brand even more coveted by your audience, go to my profile and click on the link in my Bill.
